NOTICE OF MOTION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING DEFT'S TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY REQUESTS, THE IMPOSITION OF MONETARY SANCTIONS AND THAT THE GENUINENESS OF ANY DOCUMENTS AND THE TRUTH OF ANY MATTERS SPECIFIED IN THE ADMISSION REQUESTS BE DEEMED ADMITTED FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUALITY FRESH PRODUCE, INC. HEARING SET FOR FEB-06-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF QUALITY FRESH PRODUCE, INC.'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING DEFENDANTS TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY REQUESTS, THE IMPOSITION OF MONETARY SANCTIONS AND THAT THE GENUINENESS OF ANY DOCUMENTS AND THE TRUTH OF ANY MATTERS SPECIFIED IN THE ADMISSION REQUESTS BE DEEMED ADMITTED IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEBRUARY 14, 2013 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 302. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH RILES; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF QUALITY FRESH PRODUCE, INC.'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING DEFENDANTS TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY REQUESTS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT CHOUNG MIN, IND. & DBA MINS DELIVERY SERVICE SHALL SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, THE FOLLOWING SETS OF DISCOVERY ON OR BEFORE MARCH 15, 2013: PLAINTIFF QUALITY FRESH PRODUCE, INC'S (1) FORM INTERROGATORIES TO DEFENDANT, SET ONE; (2) REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS TO DEFENDANT, SET ONE; AND (3) REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION TO DEFENDANT, SET ONE. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $810.00 IS GRANTED, AND SUCH AMOUNT SHALL BE PAID BY DEFENDANT CHOUNG MIN, IND. & DBA MINS DELIVERY SERVICE ON OR BEFORE MARCH 15, 2013. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: REBECCA WOODSON; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-07-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For An Order Compelling Deft'S To Respond To Discovery Requests, The Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions And That The Genuineness Of Any Documents And The Truth Of Any Matters Specified In The Admission Requests Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Feb-14-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert S. Bartlett, Esq. of Bartlett Leader-Picone & Young LLP, Tel. 510.444.2402, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF QUALITY FRESH PRODUCE, INC.'s Motion For An Order Compelling Defendants To Respond To Discovery Requests is GRANTED. Defendant CHOUNG MIN, ind. & dba MINS DELIVERY SERVICE shall serve verified responses, without objection, the following sets of discovery on or before March 15, 2013: Plaintiff QUALITY FRESH PRODUCE, INC's (1) Form Interrogatories to Defendant, Set One; (2) Requests for Production of Documents to Defendant, Set One; and (3) Requests for Admission to Defendant, Set One. Plaintiff's request for sanctions in the amount of $810.00 is GRANTED, and such amount shall be paid by Defendant CHOUNG MIN, ind. & dba MINS DELIVERY SERVICE on or before March 15, 2013. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported

Notice Of Motion For An Order Compelling Deft'S To Respond To Discovery Requests, The Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions And That The Genuineness Of Any Documents And The Truth Of Any Matters Specified In The Admission Requests Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Feb-06-2013 Continued To Feb-14-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF QUALITY FRESH PRODUCE, INC.'s Motion For An Order Compelling Defendants To Respond To Discovery Requests, The Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions And That The Genuineness Of Any Documents And The Truth Of Any Matters Specified In The Admission Requests Be Deemed Admitted is continued on the court's own motion to February 14, 2013 at 9:00 am in Dept. 302. Judge Pro Tem: Elizabeth Riles; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported
